title: Introducing GPT-4.5
summary: We’re releasing a research preview of GPT‑4.5—our largest and best model for chat yet. GPT‑4.5 is a step forward in scaling up pre-training and post-training.
summaryZh: 我们发布了GPT ‑ 4.5的研究预览版，这是我们迄今为止最大、最好的聊天模式。GPT ‑ 4.5是在扩大培训前和培训后规模方面向前迈出的一步。
highlights: We’re releasing a research preview of GPT‑4.5—our largest and best model for chat yet.
GPT‑4.5 is a step forward in scaling up pre-training and post-training.
highlightsZh: 我们发布了GPT ‑ 4.5的研究预览版，这是我们迄今为止最大、最好的聊天模式。GPT ‑ 4.5是在扩大培训前和培训后规模方面向前迈出的一步。

title: Deep research System Card
summary: This report outlines the safety work carried out prior to releasing deep research including external red teaming, frontier risk evaluations according to our Preparedness Framework, and an overview of the mitigations we built in to address key risk areas.
summaryZh: 本报告概述了在发布深入研究之前开展的安全工作，包括外部红色分组、根据我们的准备框架进行的前沿风险评估，以及我们为解决关键风险领域而采取的缓解措施的概述。
highlights: This report outlines the safety work carried out prior to releasing deep research including external red teaming, frontier risk evaluations according to our Preparedness Framework,
highlightsZh: 本报告概述了在发布深入研究之前开展的安全工作，包括外部红色分组、根据我们的准备框架进行的前沿风险评估，以及我们为解决关键风险领域而采取的缓解措施的概述。

title: Introducing the Intelligence Age
summary: We aired our first-ever television ad during the Super Bowl to pique people’s curiosity and help us all realize how AI can open up new possibilities for us, create more fulfillment in our lives, and make us more productive, just as all the tools that came before AI did for those who came before us.
summaryZh: 我们在超级碗期间播出了有史以来第一个电视广告，以激发人们的好奇心，并帮助我们所有人认识到人工智能如何为我们开辟新的可能性，在我们的生活中创造更多的满足感，使我们更有效率，就像人工智能之前的所有工具为我们之前的人所做的那样。
highlights: We aired our first-ever television ad during the Super Bowl to pique people’s curiosity and help us all realize how AI can open up new possibilities for us, create more fulfillment
highlightsZh: 我们在超级碗期间播出了有史以来第一个电视广告，以激发人们的好奇心，并帮助我们所有人认识到人工智能如何为我们开辟新的可能性，在我们的生活中创造更多的满足感，使我们更有效率，就像人工智能之前的所有工具为我们之前的人所做的那样。
